landing.title: Free Travel Tools
landing.subtitle: Quick, free utilities that save you hours of trip planning. No signup required.

packingList.subtitle: Tell us where and when you're going. Our AI builds a packing list tailored to the weather, the local outlets, and what you actually plan to do.
packingList.rateLimitMessage: You've hit the free hourly limit. Sign up to keep generating lists.

visaChecker.subtitle: Find out in seconds whether you need a visa for your next trip. Covers 199 passports × 199 destinations.
visaChecker.resultIntro: If you hold a {passport} passport, going to {destination}:

status.e-visa days: 📝 e-Visa required — up to {days} days stay
status.same country: You don't need a visa to enter your own country.

statusExplain.visa free: Just show up with your passport. Always check that your passport has at least 6 months validity from the date of entry.
statusExplain.visa on arrival: You can get the visa at the border or airport on arrival. Bring cash for the fee (varies by country, usually $25-100 USD) and check whether you need a return ticket.
statusExplain.eta: An online pre-authorization linked to your passport. Apply on the official government site before booking your flight — most are issued within minutes but some take 72 hours.
statusExplain.e-visa: Apply online before you travel. Lead times range from 3-30 days depending on the country. Use the official government portal — there are scam sites that mimic them.
statusExplain.visa required: You need to apply at the destination's embassy or consulate before traveling. Allow 2-8 weeks for processing. Some countries require an in-person appointment.
statusExplain.no admission: Entry is currently not permitted, typically due to a travel ban, sanctions, or active conflict. Situations change — check the latest official guidance.

visaChecker.officialSourcePrefix: Always confirm with the official source before booking:
visaChecker.ivisaSubtext: iVisa handles the paperwork — get pre-filled forms and 24/7 support.
visaChecker.advisoryUkSource: Source: UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
visaChecker.disclaimer: Visa rules change without notice. This tool is a planning aid based on the latest publicly available data — always verify with the official source for your specific situation (purpose of visit, nationality of birth vs. residence, dual citizenship, etc).
visaChecker.noResultTitle: We don't have data for that pair yet
visaChecker.noResultSubtitle: Try a different passport or destination, or check the official embassy site.
